what_tested: SCALE: 50 active nodes × 10 FL rounds (2.5× nodes, 1.25× rounds vs pipeline)
BYZANTINE INJECTION: 15% per round = 8 nodes/round in deterministic rotating pattern; nodes simulated with PCR mismatch (hardware_trusted = False)
UNGATED BASELINE: separate FL run without attestation gates; per-round wall-clock time measured to quantify TPM overhead as % of round time
TRUE POSITIVE RATE: correctly quarantined Byzantine nodes / total Byzantine injected; false negatives (slipped through) and false positives tracked
OVERHEAD QUANTIFICATION: TPM attestation ms / round total ms computed per round; avg overhead % reported in final validation report
CRASH SAFETY: all 10 rounds wrapped with round-level state tracking; pipeline failure is surfaced, not silently caught
results: TPM overhead as % of round time: quantified and printed per-round
Ungated avg round time captured; overhead vs ungated % computed
Final validation report printed with 4 pass/fail criteria
All 4 success criteria met (rounds completed, TPR >90%, overhead quantified, report printed)

4 charts rendered: FL convergence (accuracy + loss dual-axis), latency gated vs ungated with overhead fill, overhead % per round with avg line, quarantine timeline with Byzantine injection markers (↓NB)
sv_validation_report dict assembled with 5 top-level keys
